Off Calendar Jun-24-2010 Continued To Jul-08-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

J. Michael Phelps, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Johnnie Mae Washington, who was placed under oath but did not testify.
No appearance by defendant Linda Stockdale.
Default on the Third Amended Complaint was entered today, June 24, 2010.
Doe defendants have not yet been dismissed.

The Court requires further review of plaintiff's documentation in order to proceed with the default prove-up hearing. Good cause appearing, this matter is continued to July 8, 2010 @ 9:00 a.m. in Department 218.
